records.content_snippet:
agents:
  planner:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 3
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: both

  researcher:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 2
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: work

  creator:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 2
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: both

  visual:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 1
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: work

  critic:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 3
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: work

  memory_agent:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 10
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: both

  executor:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 1
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: work
    require_approval: true

  watchdog:
    enabled: true
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 15
    missed_heartbeat_threshold_multiplier: 2
    mode: system

  auditor:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 5
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: work

  interacter:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 5
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: both

  reporter:
    enabled: true
    max_concurrent_tasks: 2
    heartbeat_interval_seconds: 30
    mode: work
